title: Oracle has fired 21,000 employees this year, cites AI replacements in annual filing
description: Oracle has disclosed that its workforce shrank by 21,000 employees over the past year, with the company acknowledging that artificial intelligence has contributed to some job reductions. The cuts come as Oracle pours billions into AI infrastructure, while reports also point to withdrawn job and internship offers at leading Indian engineering institutes.

title: Tech giant Oracle cuts 21,000 jobs as it embraces AI
description: The cuts are part of a wider trend among tech firms as they spend hundreds of billions of dollars on AI.

title: IBM and OpenAI partner to bring frontier AI to enterprise cyber defense
description: IBM has announced a partnership with OpenAI aimed at helping enterprises defend against increasingly sophisticated cyber threats by integrating frontier AI into security operations and workflows. The collaboration comes as organizations face a growing challenge from attackers that are also leveraging advanced AI tools to accelerate cyberattacks.

title: IBM partners with OpenAI on enterprise security AI
description: IBM joined the OpenAI Daybreak Cyber Partner Program and is collaborating with the startup to integrate protective AI tools directly into business operations, helping companies identify and minimize their security risks.

title: Singapore’s AI opportunity is no longer about adoption, it’s about discipline
description: Singapore’s startup ecosystem has entered a more demanding phase. For the past decade, Southeast Asia has been defined by digital adoption: more users, more platforms, more capital, and more ambitious founders. That story is still alive. The latest Google, Temasek, and Bain e-Conomy SEA 2025 report estimates that ASEAN’s digital economy will surpass US$300 billion in GMV, [...] The post Singapore’s AI opportunity is no longer about adoption, it’s about discipline appeared first on e27 .
